name: claude-adapter-drift
title: Fix claude adapter drift: installer detection/receipt stability and sd:start delegation
description: Two related pack defects on Claude Code consumers: (1) install.py claude-platform detection depends on gitignored .claude/ markers, so refreshes from fresh checkouts silently drop the claude adapter and rewrite the tracked receipt, while refreshes from initialized checkouts commit receipts promising gitignored files that fail the install audit in every other checkout (observed: rwbp-website 07-01, anomaly-metric-creator 07-02). (2) The Claude command adapter for /sd:start delegates to the trellis-start skill, which never exists on Claude Code (the SessionStart hook replaces it), so /sd:start always ends in its blocker path.
creator: sdelmas
